# Guray Formation

**Summary**: A Late Cretaceous carbonate formation in the Arabian Gulf region.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] analyzed the Gudair Formation to determine its age and depositional setting.

## Depositional Environment

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] fluctuated between shallow platform and shelf environments

## Reservoir Properties



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The formation was proven to be of late Early to Middle Campanian age. ([[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989, p. 16]])

## Conflicting Interpretations Across Sources

- [[1989-abdou|Abdou, 1989]] recrystallization, iron staining, and silicification
